title: Mace Rework!
description: This resourcepack adds new 3d cool texture of a mace. Looks cool isn't it?
body:
🔨 This recource pack replaces default texture of the mace to a bit round **3D Mace!**

![(ignore this dude)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e49b9def6878f65bb3838d9cbae9655b413f9e4a_0.webp)


## ⚙️ Supports:
- 1.21 - 1.21.10 Version of  Java Minecraft.
- Does NOT conflict with any resource packs(unless the pack related to mace itself).
- Includes custom texture.

### 🎨 Installation guide:

- 1️⃣ Download the .zip resource pack 📥
- 2️⃣ Open Minecraft → Options ⚙️ → Resource Packs → Open Pack Folder 📂
- 3️⃣ Put the .zip file there (don’t unzip ❌)
- 4️⃣ Enable it in-game ✅ → Done ✔️

- 🎉 Finished!
